description: Generate and review coding-agent artifacts as structured local visual documents with diagrams, wireframes, prototypes, annotations, feedback, and HTML export.

auth.setup: Install with the Agent-Native CLI to add the /visual-plan and /visual-recap skills plus the local companion MCP connector. This template is intended for local review without account setup.

surfaces.description: Create or open a Visual Companion artifact for a coding-agent task.
Create a visual recap plan from a PR, commit, branch, or git diff for high-altitude review.
